completed_tasks: Preserved the approved reference-backed Jazz shorthand formatter and idempotent alphaTab SVG transformation.
Changed mobile score density from four to three measures per row while retaining four measures per row above 640px.
Increased raised alterations and modifiers to 80% and replaced SVG super with an explicit 38% baseline shift.
Completed four browser-backed visual iterations, rejecting global center alignment before selecting the final responsive layout and modifier treatment.
notes: Iteration 1 centered chord anchors and used 78% super modifiers; rejected because long slash-chord pairs became cramped.
Iteration 2 used three mobile measures per row and 78% super modifiers; chord separation improved but modifiers remained detached.
Iteration 3 kept three measures and 78% size with 28% shift; attachment improved but semantic hierarchy was too weak.
Iteration 4 used three measures, 80% size, and 38% shift; accepted for readable grouping and clear modifier hierarchy.
No source song data, alphaTex generation, CSS, dependencies, or desktop measure density changed.
